execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: ‘No deal needed, US will exit Iran war in 2-3 weeks’: How Trump shifted goalpost. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: ‘No deal needed, US will exit Iran war in 2-3 weeks’: How Trump shifted goalpost
key_developments.detail: Thirty days into a conflict that was supposed to last four to six weeks, the US war objectives in the Iran war have shifted so dramatically that what the Trump administration once threatened to bomb Iran over, it now says isn’t even its problem. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
